creator: dmitry_kuleshov@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #41)
Hi, still have problems on Gen2 VMs (Windows Server 2019) to Passthrough in guest FreeBSD 12.2-Stable, now it's on PCI Express Intel 82576 4 LAN Port card (Ryzen 9 5900X on B550: AMD-V, IOMMU, ACS active). I have try it in guest Ubuntu 20.04 and it works great without any issues.
